title: BYO corpus record — google_drive
description: A Google Drive file. Content is returned by files.export; subtype picks the Workspace type / export format.

content.description: The retrieval payload served verbatim as the body.

title.description: Document title (email subject / file name / issue title / page title).

folder.description: The folder this document belongs to (default: the source_type).

group.description: ACL group owning the folder (default: slug(container)).

visibility.description: public = org-wide, group = the container's group, private = author only.

readers.description: Explicit reader principals (emails -> users, else group ids). Overrides visibility.

meta.description: Free-form per-source structured extras merged into the record.

created.description: createdTime (epoch seconds or ISO 8601). Default: synthesized from doc_id.

updated.description: modifiedTime (epoch seconds or ISO 8601). Default: created + 1h.

trashed.description: Whether the file is trashed (files.list excludes trashed by default).
